Class Nursery

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.AbstractStructure
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.Structure
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.nursery.Nursery
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, HasTimer, Positioned, ControllableStructure, ControllableNursery, ReadableNursery, ReadableStructure
public class Nursery extends Structure implements ReadableNursery, ControllableNursery
